raw_response_text:
<features>
- Bright yellow-orange tubular flowers clustered together
- Small, pointed petals with a slightly curved shape
- Visible stamens with orange anthers
- Greenish stems and foliage with a slightly rough texture
- Flowers appear densely packed in a vertical cluster
</features>

<kb>
- IF [flowers are bright purple with a dark center and elongated petals] THEN [class 44]
- IF [flowers are white with a yellow center and broad, layered petals] THEN [class 77]
- IF [flowers are bright yellow-orange, tubular, clustered densely in a vertical arrangement, with pointed petals and visible stamens] THEN [class 45]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The Target Image best matches the rule for class 45 because it exhibits bright yellow-orange tubular flowers clustered densely in a vertical arrangement, with pointed petals and visible stamens. These features align perfectly with the observable patterns in the labeled examples for class 45.
</rule_check>

<response>45</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- Single prominent flower in focus
- Petals are smooth and slightly ruffled with a deep purple/violet hue
- Central reproductive parts (stamens/pistils) are dark brownish-red and clustered
- Petals have a slightly curved, rounded shape with a pointed tip
- Green stem visible at the base
- Background is blurred and out of focus, emphasizing the flower
</features>

<kb>
- IF [flower has bright orange-yellow petals with orange centers and red buds] THEN [45]
- IF [flower has soft pink petals with a dark center, slightly ruffled edges, and a green stem] THEN [44]
- IF [flower has large, white or pale pink petals with a prominent yellow center, broad and flat petal shape] THEN [77]
- IF [flower has deep purple/violet petals with dark brownish-red central reproductive parts, smooth and slightly ruffled edges] THEN [44]
</kb>

<rule_check>
The Target Image best matches the rule:
- IF [flower has deep purple/violet petals with dark brownish-red central reproductive parts, smooth and slightly ruffled edges] THEN [44]
This is because the Target Image shares the same deep purple/violet petal color, dark brownish-red central reproductive parts, and smooth petal texture as the labeled examples for class 44. The shape and focus on the flower also align with the class 44 examples.
</rule_check>

<response>44</response>

- IF [flower has large, white or pale pink petals with a prominent yellow center, broad and flat petal shape] THEN [77]
- IF [flower has deep purple/violet petals with dark brownish-red central reproductive parts, smooth and slightly ruffled edges] THEN [44]
</kb>

<rule_check>
The Target Image best matches the rule:
- IF [flower has deep purple/violet petals with dark brownish-red central reproductive parts, smooth and slightly ruffled edges] THEN [44]
This is because the Target Image shares the same deep purple/violet petal color, dark brownish-red central reproductive parts, and smooth petal texture as the labeled examples for class 44. The shape and focus on the flower also align with the class 44 examples.
</rule_check>

<response>44</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- Petals are broad, flat, and layered with a smooth, slightly ruffled edge
- Color is a soft, uniform pink with a gradient from light pink at the edges to deeper pink near the center
- Central yellow stamens forming a distinct, bright contrast against the pink petals
- Petals are arranged in a symmetrical, circular pattern with a slightly open bloom
- Green leafy stem visible beneath the flower, with elongated leaves
- No visible orange or red hues in petals or stamens
</features>

<kb>
- IF [petals are orange/yellow with red spots and a tubular shape] THEN [45]
- IF [petals are deep purple with a velvety texture and dark center] THEN [44]
- IF [petals are broad, flat, and layered in soft pink with a bright yellow center and symmetrical circular arrangement] THEN [77]
</kb>

<rule_check>
The Target Image best matches the rule for class 77 because:
- The petals are broad, flat, and layered with a smooth ruffled edge, matching the visual pattern of class 77.
- The color is a soft pink gradient with a bright yellow center, consistent with class 77.
- The symmetrical circular arrangement and the visible green stem with elongated leaves further align with the observable features of class 77.
- The absence of orange, red, or deep purple hues rules out classes 45 and 44.
</rule_check>

<response>77</response>

- Never omit the final <response> block, even when another explanation block is required.

- IF [observable visual features] THEN [class]
